# GitHub Project Directory

A curated directory of useful open-source GitHub projects with selection guides, comparison criteria and AI-search-friendly summaries.

## Important pages
- Home: /
- Projects: /projects/
- Guides: /guides/
- Selection checklist: /guides/github-project-selection-checklist.html
- AI-search directory guide: /guides/how-to-build-ai-search-friendly-directory.html

## Data
- Project data: /data/projects.json

## Positioning
Independent educational directory for builders, founders and small teams. Not affiliated with GitHub.
